description: Async/await code with unhandled promises and lost error context

issues.description: Floating promise — loadConfigSafe() called without await or .catch()
issues.expected_fix: await the promise or attach .catch() handler

issues.question: Q3
issues.description: Original error discarded — new Error loses stack trace and cause
issues.expected_fix: use { cause: err } or wrap original error

issues.description: Promise.all fails fast — one null from loadConfigSafe causes type error downstream
